name: Sync Management UI
summary: User interface for triggering project data synchronization and monitoring progress. Shows sync status, storage location selection, and real-time progress with cancellation support.
goals: Allow users to trigger full or incremental sync
Display real-time sync progress with cancellation

acceptanceCriteria.given: a user is on the graph page with no data
acceptanceCriteria.when: they trigger a sync with a storage location
acceptanceCriteria.then: sync starts and progress is displayed in real-time with a cancel option

specDetail.description: SyncView component provides the sync trigger interface with storage location selection (project or user). SyncProgress component overlays the graph page during active sync, showing real-time progress messages. Users can cancel an in-progress sync via the cancel button.
parameters: SyncView offers storage location options: project-scoped or user-scoped
SyncProgress overlays the graph content during sync with semi-transparent backdrop
Progress messages stream from the server via SSE
Cancel button available during active sync

constraints: Sync cannot be triggered without an active project
Only one sync can run at a time per project
Sync progress overlay blocks interaction with graph views
Network interruption during sync leaves partial data state

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): migrate spec tree to unified node folder structure
